creator: pierre-yves.peneau@lirmm.fr
text:
Created attachment 161801
dmesg, uname, fusioninventory log and configuration

Hi,

Last week I installed the p5-FusionInventory-Agent port and I noticed
that I could not start the agent in daemon mode. After seeing the log,
it seems that two ports were missing in dependencies : p5-proc-daemon
and p5-proc-pidfile . After installing those ports, everything works
like a charm.
